app.title: Hybrid Attention
app.author: JohannaAlmeida
app.description: An open-source attention mechanism that combines the strengths of both self-attention and cross-attention
use_modes: Train a model on a benchmark dataset and evaluate its performance.
Use a pre-trained model as a starting point and fine-tune it on a new task.
proposed_tests: Benchmark the performance of the Hybrid Attention model on a series of language tasks.
Analyze the effect of varying the hyperparameters on the model's performance.
